fields.summary: Provides extension methods for converting between <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" />, <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" />, and <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`ColorExtensions` bridges the color representations used by SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp.
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor> stores color as `0xAARRGGBB` (ARGB), while
<xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor> uses `0xBBGGRRAA` (BGRA). The conversion methods handle
the byte reordering automatically.

These methods are available as extension methods on `SKColor`, `SKColorF`, and `HBColor`.

## Examples

```csharp
SKColor skColor = SKColors.Red;
HBColor hbColor = skColor.ToHBColor();

SKColor roundTripped = hbColor.ToSKColor();
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> to the equivalent <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> with the same red, green, blue, and alpha components as <paramref name="color" />.

entries.signature: public static HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor (this SkiaSharp.SKColor color);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> to the nearest <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> with components clamped to the 0–255 range and rounded from <paramref name="color" />.

entries.signature: public static HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor (this SkiaSharp.SKColorF color);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to the equivalent <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> with the same red, green, blue, and alpha components as <paramref name="hbColor" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor ToSKColor (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to the equivalent <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> with each component normalized to the 0.0–1.0 range.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorF ToSKColorF (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor);

fields.summary: Converts an array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values to an array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> values.
fields.returns: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> values corresponding to each element in <paramref name="hbColors" />.

params.hbColors: The array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values to convert.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor[] ToSKColors (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor[] hbColors);
